title: Magic Mirrors
description: The most magical homey experience. Adds a magic mirror that allows you to teleport to your spawn position from any dimension!
body:
# 📖 What's this mod?
Have you ever had a rough day in the mines, hurting in a boss battle, or far away from home? If only you could be home in just one click.. well now you can!

This mod adds an item called Magic Mirror that will teleport you to what your current spawn location is set too. Either your cozy bed or where you were created in the world!

# ✅ Features:
- Spawn Point Teleportation
- Custom Dimension Support

# DISCLAIMER
Currently causing issues with NBT data causing crashing and non-use of cauldrons.
